stem: Rectangles WXYZ and JKLM are similar. The length of each side of JKLM is 5 times the length of the corresponding side of WXYZ. The area of WXYZ is 8 square units. What is the area, in square units, of JKLM?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The ratio of areas of similar figures is the square of the linear scale factor. With scale factor 5, areas scale by 25, so JKLM has area 8 × 25 = 200 square units.

Choice B multiplies by 5 instead of 25. Choice C gives only the area scale factor. Choice D squares 40.
